questions.name: IntubationHistoryWasIntubated
questions.title: Had {CmpnName} been intubated under anesthesia for any reason in the 12 months prior to the first LP symptoms?

questions.name: IntubationHistoryConcerns
questions.title: Do you remember having any concerns about how the intubation/anesthesia affected {CmpnName}?

questions.name: IntubationHistorySymptoms
questions.title: What symptoms did {CmpnName} have after the intubation/anesthesia?

questions.name: BreathingCrisisDidHave
questions.title: Did {CmpnName} ever have a breathing crisis that required an emergency visit to a veterinary professional?

questions.name: BreathingCrisisCount
questions.title: How many times did {CmpnName} visit a veterinary professional due to an LP/GOLPP-associated breathing crisis?

questions.name: BreathingCrisisCost
questions.title: About what was the total pre-insurance cost of these visits?
items: Don't know or prefer not to say

questions.name: BreathingCrisisAdvice
questions.title: Did a veterinary professional give you any advice on how to deal with an LP-induced breathing emergency/crisis?

questions.name: BreathingCrisisAdviceType
questions.title: What advice did they give you to help you deal with a breathing crisis?
items: Get them to a cool place
Apply ice, a cooling vest, or some other cooling agent
Bring them to an emergency facility immediately

questions.name: BreathingCrisisProvidedSubstance
questions.title: Did a veterinary professional provide you with a substance or product to help deal with an LP/GOLPP-induced breathing emergency/crisis?

questions.title: Age in years (number):

questions.title: Months (number 0 - 11)

questions.name: PrimaryDurationVisitsNumber
questions.title: About how many times did a primary veterinarian see {CmpnName} about LP/GOLPP symptoms?

questions.name: PrimaryDurationCost
questions.title: About what was the total pre-insurance cost of these visits to primary veterinarians about {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP symptoms?
items: Don't know or prefer not to say

questions.name: PrimaryDurationChangedVets
questions.title: Did you ever change primary veterinarians because how they handled {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP symptoms?

questions.name: PrimaryDurationChangedVetsReason
questions.title: Why did you change veterinarians after {CmpnName} started showing symptoms of LP/GOLPP?
questions.description: Please check all that apply.
items: The previous vet said nothing could be done about {CmpnName}'s symptoms.
The previous vet couldn't give possible causes for {CmpnName}'s symptoms.
The previous vet said {CmpnName}'s symptoms were just due to age.
The previous vet ordered tests that I didn't think were relevant.

questions.name: PrimaryVetInflammation
questions.title: Did your primary veterinarian observe any inflammation, irritation, or infection in the larynx/pharynx area?

questions.name: PrimaryVetReflux
questions.title: Did your primary veterinarian mention reflux (GERD) or esophageal dysfunction as a possible cause of {CmpnName}'s symptoms?

questions.name: PrimaryVetRefluxMeds
questions.title: Did your primary veterinarian prescribe or recommend a reflux medication such as Pepcid (famotadine) or Prilosec (omeprazole) for reflux?

questions.name: PrimaryVetRefluxInitiative
questions.title: Did you start {CmpnName} on reflux medications such as Pepcid (famotadine) or Prilosec (omeprazole) on your own intiative without a prescription or recommendation from your primary vet?

questions.name: PrimaryVetDidDiscuss
questions.title: Did your primary vet discuss LP/GOLPP as a possible cause of {CmpnName}'s symptoms?
items: No, did not mention LP/GOLPP at all
Said {CmpnName}'s symptoms were possibly due to LP/GOLPP
Said {CmpnName}'s symptoms were definitely due to LP/GOLPP

questions.name: PrimaryVetInfo
questions.title: Did your current primary veterinarian give you helpful information about how LP/GOLPP might affect {CmpnName}?

questions.name: PrimaryVetInfoDetails
questions.title: What did they tell you about the how LP/GOLPP might affect {CmpnName}?

questions.name: PrimaryVetSurgery
questions.title: Did your primary veterinarian make a recommendation about tieback or other LP/GOLPP surgeries for {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP?
items: Encouraged me to talk to a surgeon

questions.name: PrimaryVetSurgeryPerception
questions.title: Do you feel like your primary veterinarian's recommendation against surgery was due to {CmpnName}'s condition or to a generally negative perception of tieback surgery?

questions.name: PrimaryVetConfidence
questions.title: How confident have you been you in your current primary veterinarian's knowledge level regarding LP/GOLPP?
questions.description: 1 = not at all confident, 5 = very confident

questions.name: PrimaryVetSatisfaction
questions.title: How satisfied have you been with your current primary veterinarian's handling of {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP?
questions.description: 1 = not at all satisfied, 5 = very satisfied

questions.name: DiagnosisWho
questions.title: Which veterinary professional provided you with the definitive LP/GOLPP diagnosis:

questions.name: DiagnosticType
questions.title: What diagnostic procedure was used to arrive at the definitive diagnosis?
items: Video endoscope or laryngoscope under anesthesia

questions.name: DiagnosisStage
questions.title: Was {CmpnName} diagnosed with unilateral or bilateral LP?
items: I wasn't told what stage {CmpnName}'s LP was in

questions.name: DiagnosisTimeAfterSymptoms
questions.title: About how long after {CmpnName}'s first symptoms appeared did you get the diagnosis?:
items: Between six months and a year

questions.name: DiagnosisCost
questions.title: What was the pre-insurance cost of the diagnosis?

questions.name: DiagnosisSurgeonContingent
questions.title: Did the surgeon perform the diagnosis without requiring surgery afterwards?
questions.description: In other words, did the surgeon refuse to do the diagnosis unless you agreed to go straight to surgery if the results were positive?
items: Yes, required surgery consent before diagnosis
No, did not require surgery consent for diagnosis

questions.name: TreatmentFactorsDecision
questions.title: Have you made a decision about whether or not to pursue LP surgery such as tieback for {CmpnName}?
items: We will pursue LP surgery such as tieback.
We've decided not to pursue LP surgery.

questions.name: TreatmentFactorsDecisionStent
questions.title: If a veterinarian were to offer a stent implant for LP/GOLPP in your area, would you explore that as a surgery alternative?
items: Yes, we would consider a stent implant.
No, we would not consider a stent implant.

questions.title: How many times did {CmpnName} get AP after the stent implant?

questions.name: AspirationCost
questions.title: What was the approximate pre-insurance cost of the AP treatment for {CmpnName}:

questions.name: NeuropathySymptomsDoesHave
questions.title: Over the course of {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP journey, did {CmpnName} experience persistent hind-end weakness?

questions.name: NeuropathySymptomsFirst
questions.title: Which LP/GOLPP symptom appeared first in {CmpnName}?
items: They both appeared at about the same time

questions.name: NeuropathySymptomsBreathingOnset
questions.title: About how long after you first noticed hind-end weakness did the breathing issues begin?

questions.name: NeuropathySymptomsHindEndOnset
questions.title: About now long after you first noticed breathing issues did the hind-end weakness begin?

questions.name: NeuropathySymptomsTypeProgression
questions.title: Which progressed faster, the breathing issues or the hind-end weakness?
items: They both progressed at about the same rate

questions.name: NeuropathyOtherIssues
questions.title: Over the course of {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP, did any of these issues also appear?
items: No, {CmpnName} never had any of these issues

questions.name: ConclusionSpecialConsiderations
questions.title: Please describe any special considerations for {CmpnName} due to LP-related breathing issues:
items: Type, amount or frequency of feeding
Other behavior restrictions i.e., anxiety, excitement

questions.name: ConclusionGeneralCondition
questions.title: Please describe {CmpnName}'s general physical condition:

questions.name: ConclusionQOL
questions.title: How would you rate {CmpnName}'s quality of life at this stage?
questions.description: 1 = very poor, 3 = fair, 5 = very good

questions.name: ConclusionOtherConditionsNew
questions.title: Did {CmpnName} develop any new conditions during {cvGenderObjectPronoun} LP/GOLPP journey that {cvGenderSubjectPronoun} didn't have before?

questions.name: ConclusionOtherConditions
questions.title: What other conditions did {CmpnName} develop during {cvGenderObjectPronoun} LP/GOLPP journey?
questions.description: The selections you made about the beginning of {CmpnName}'s LP/GOLPP journey are preselected.

questions.name: ConclusionCauseOfDeath
questions.title: What was the ultimate reason why {CmpnName} crossed over the Rainbow Bridge?
items: Post-op complications of LP-related surgical procedure
Quality of life due to polyneuropathy or hind-end weakness
Quality of life due to LP-related breathing problems

questions.name: ConclusionOtherPathTieback
questions.title: What if anything would you differently?
items: I would pursue the same treatment path as with {CmpnName}
I would not do tieback surgery again
I would do tieback surgery sooner than I did with {CmpnName}
I would wait to do tieback surgery longer than I did with {CmpnName}

questions.name: ConclusionOtherPathBVEAP
questions.title: Faced with the same decisions with another LP/GOLPP companion, what if anything would you differently?
items: I would pursue the same treatment path as with {CmpnName}
I would not do BVEAP surgery again
I would do BVEAP surgery sooner than I did with {CmpnName}
I would wait to do BVEAP surgery longer than I did with {CmpnName}

questions.name: ConclusionOtherPathStent
questions.title: Faced with the same decisions with another LP/GOLPP companion, what if anything would you differently??
items: I would pursue the same treatment path as with {CmpnName}
I would not do the laryngeal stent implant again
I would do laryngeal stent implant surgery sooner than I did with {CmpnName}
I would wait to do a laryngeal stent implant longer than I did with {CmpnName}

items: I would pursue the same treatment path as with {CmpnName}
I would not do the arytenoidectomy surgery again
I would do the arytenoidectomy surgery sooner than I did with {CmpnName}
I would wait to do the arytenoidectomy longer than I did with {CmpnName}

questions.name: ConclusionOtherPathVentrilocordectomy
questions.title: Faced with the same decisions with another LP/GOLPP companion, what if anything would you differently?
items: I would pursue the same treatment path as with {CmpnName}
I would not do the ventrilocordectomy surgery again
I would do the ventrilocordectomy surgery sooner than I did with {CmpnName}
I would wait to do the ventrilocordectomy longer than I did with {CmpnName}

questions.name: ConclusionOtherPathNoTreatment
questions.title: Faced with the same decisions with another LP/GOLPP companion, what if anything would you differently?
items: I would pursue the same treatment path as with {CmpnName}
I would pursue tieback, laryngeal stent, or other veterinary procedure

questions.name: ConclusionStentAlternative
questions.title: If the laryngeal stent were widely available, would you pursue that as an alternative to surgery?

questions.name: ConclusionDifferentChoices
questions.title: Please briefly describe things you might do differently if you were to have another dog with LP/GOLPP (optional).
